contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Diagnose + fix Sophia empty-response; codify one-PR-per-turn planning convention
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/227
  
  Details:
  Root-caused the '⚠️ Autopilot produced an empty response' Sophia returned on the Public-Key Lookup Cache thread: a turn that exhausts CHAT_MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS (30) forces a text-only completion, DeepSeek emits DSML tool-call syntax as content, _strip_dsml empties it, and the streaming /chat path (Telegram) had no backstop -> empty done.response. Fixed in PR #227 (merged + deployed to the autopilot box, truesight-autopilot.service restarted): added _needs_clean_retry/_ensure_nonempty_final guards making the streaming path symmetric with the non-streaming handler, plus hermetic regression tests (529 passing). Also codified a workspace-wide one-PR-per-turn planning convention in agentic_ai_context OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS.md section 5a and re-scoped the Public-Key Lookup Cache handoff (plan + HANDOFF_MANIFEST) so Sophia's round cap no longer chokes on whole-roadmap turns.
- Contributor(s): Claude
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
